ANNUAL PERFORMANCE REVIEW
Employee: David Johnson
Title: Senior Engineer
Department: Engineering - Sacramento
Review Period: January 1, 2024 - December 31, 2024
Reviewer: Robert Williams, VP Engineering

OVERALL RATING: Exceeds Expectations (4.2 / 5.0)

TECHNICAL COMPETENCY: 4.5/5
David continues to demonstrate strong technical skills across our platform.
He led the migration of our legacy authentication system to OAuth 2.0,
completing the project 2 weeks ahead of schedule with zero production incidents.

TEAMWORK & COLLABORATION: 4.0/5
David mentors junior engineers effectively and participates actively in
code reviews. He could improve cross-team communication with the product team.

LEADERSHIP: 4.0/5
David took ownership of the on-call rotation redesign, reducing after-hours
pages by 40%. He represents the team well in architecture discussions.

AREAS FOR IMPROVEMENT:
- Documentation of architectural decisions could be more thorough
- Consider presenting at internal tech talks to share knowledge more broadly

GOALS FOR 2025:
1. Lead the API gateway modernization project
2. Mentor at least 2 junior engineers
3. Obtain cloud architecture certification

MANAGER COMMENTS:
David is a valuable senior contributor. His consistent high performance
and deep institutional knowledge make him essential to the team.

Employee Signature: David Johnson     Date: February 15, 2025
Manager Signature: Robert Williams    Date: February 14, 2025
